Stories Tagged "Mirror Folklore"

A focused archive path for Mirror Folklore, collecting 6 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Mythic Objects

The Mirror That Shows a Room Before It Is Entered: Meaning, Symbolism, and Folklore

An archive reading built around a small mirror reveals a room as it looked moments before arrival.

Mythic Objects - 11 min read
Mythic Objects

The Ring That Must Be Returned Through Water: What the Object Gives, Takes, or Remembers

An archive reading built around a ring may only be returned to its owner by passing through running water.

Mythic Objects - 8 min read
Mythic Objects

The Lantern Wick That Burns Backward: A Mythic Object Folklore Note

A mystery-minded record built around a lantern wick burns backward when travelers take the wrong road home.

Mythic Objects - 11 min read
Mythic Objects

The Mirror Nail in the Doorframe: A Household Object Folklore Record

A mystery-minded record built around a mirror nail in a doorframe is said to keep reflections from entering the wrong room.

Mythic Objects - 8 min read
Mythic Objects

The Bell That Rings When a Promise Is Kept

A strange archive note about a small bell rings only when a promise has been kept by someone who never heard it.

Mythic Objects - 10 min read
Mythic Objects

The Bowl That Never Holds the Same Reflection

A strange archive note about a ceremonial bowl never holds the same reflection twice in local object stories.
